summary: Completed comprehensive testing of UK Salary Sacrifice & Savings Optimiser 4-step wizard. All core functionality working correctly including tax calculations, salary sacrifice schemes, pension vs ISA comparison, and results dashboard.

design_issues.issue: Chart rendering warnings in console about width/height being -1
design_issues.note: Charts still render correctly, this is a minor styling issue during transitions

passed_tests: Step 1 form: £110k salary, age 35, tax region, student loan, employer pension inputs
Step 1 tax summary preview with correct values (Income Tax £32,432, NI £4,211, Take-Home £65,914, Marginal Rate 60%)
60% tax trap warning for £110k salary in PA taper zone
Step 1 to Step 2 navigation via 'Continue to Salary Sacrifice' button
Step 2 pension scheme toggle and input modes (% vs £/month), set to 10%
Step 2 EV lease toggle with monthly cost and list price inputs
Step 2 Cycle to Work toggle with equipment value and cap selector
Step 2 summary bar showing total sacrifice £16,800/yr and estimated tax saved £10,416/yr
Step 3 monthly saving amount input, growth rate slider, time horizon slider
Step 3 vehicle selection toggles (Pension, S&S ISA, Cash ISA, LISA)
LISA toggle appears correctly for age 35
Step 3 tab switching between Simple Comparison and Projection Chart
Step 4 results dashboard with before/after table, tax saved metrics, Export to PDF button
Navigation back to completed steps with state preservation
Scotland tax region test: £75k salary shows 42% marginal rate
PA taper test: £110k salary shows 60% marginal rate and PA of £7,570
